rulings.Calendar Matter: Viacom Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion By Viacom Inc. To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 583.310 And 583.360
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 7, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Viacom Inc.¿s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution pursuant to C.C.P. §§ 583.310 and 583.360 is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless counsel for defendant notifies plaintiffs of this tentative ruling, and they state that they do not wish to contest. = (220/HEK)
